=== COMPOSE FILE ===
name: sakay
services:
  postgres:
    image: timescale/timescaledb-ha:pg16
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: sakay
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ce5a8942f7f3893f032fd6514965bbfe
      POSTGRES_DB: sakay
      TIMESCALEDB_TELEMETRY: "off"
    volumes:
      - /opt/sakay/postgres-data:/home/postgres/pgdata/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U sakay -d sakay"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10
    networks: [sakaynet]

  caddy:
    image: caddy:2.8-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
      - "443:443/udp"
    volumes:
      - /opt/sakay/Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro
      - /opt/sakay/caddy-data:/data
      - /opt/sakay/caddy-config:/config
      - /var/log/caddy:/var/log/caddy
    networks: [sakaynet]

  api:
    image: ghcr.io/marx-wil/sakay-api:latest
    profiles: [app]
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    env_file: /opt/sakay/.env
    networks: [sakaynet]

  worker:
    image: ghcr.io/marx-wil/sakay-api:latest
    profiles: [app]
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    env_file: /opt/sakay/.env
    command: ["node", "dist/workers/index.js"]
    networks: [sakaynet]

networks:
  sakaynet:
    driver: bridge
=== ENV FILE (passwords redacted) ===
NODE_ENV=production
LOG_LEVEL=info
PORT=3000
HOST=0.0.0.0
PUBLIC_API_URL=
PUBLIC_WEB_URL=
DATABASE_URL=postgres://sakay:ce5a8942f7f3893f032fd6514965bbfe@postgres:5432/sakay
JWT_ISSUER=sakay-api
JWT_TTL_SECONDS=2592000
MAGIC_LINK_TTL_SECONDS=600
EMAIL_PROVIDER=ses
EMAIL_FROM="San Sasakay <no-reply@>"
AWS_REGION=ap-southeast-1
S3_BACKUP_BUCKET=sakay-api-prod-backups
AGGREGATOR_TICK_SECONDS=10
REPORT_DECAY_START_MINUTES=30
REPORT_EXPIRY_MINUTES=45
